title: Oct2020: \d shows empty result in schema created by include sql script
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE <test_schema>.<test_table> (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT GRAPH_NAME, TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM DB.DBA.SYS_STORAGE WHERE GRAPH_NAME = 'test_schema' AND TABLE_NAME = 'test_table';
key_bug_features: Empty result from sys.var() in specific schema
